name: 打臉復仇（上司被迫下跪）
description: 一直被上司霸凌的女主，在男主強勢介入下看著上司從倒數威脅變成下跪磕頭求饒。權力關係瞬間反轉，之前積累的屈辱感全部釋放。

examples.drama_title: 申浩男&朱丽岚 | 她是秦家灭门案幸存者，化名寻凶复仇时，遇上深不可测的他。二人在试探中相互吸引[MULTI SUB | FULL]#MiniDrama #精彩大陆短剧
examples.excerpt: Either kneel down and apologize to her or leave a finger as compensation / Five Four / Grandma I was wrong I'll kowtow to you / You can have whatever you want please forgive me / Don't plagiarize my plans anymore / I was blind I'll never dare to do it again
